mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_fault_prediction ( device_id, prediction_date, target_month, predicted_fault_count, failure_probability, fault_count_lower, fault_count_upper, feature_importance, model_type, created_at ) VALUES ( #{deviceId}, #{predictionDate}, #{targetMonth}, #{predictedFaultCount}, #{failureProbability}, #{faultCountLower}, #{faultCountUpper}, #{featureImportance}, #{modelType}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO ai_fault_prediction ( device_id, prediction_date, target_month, predicted_fault_count, failure_probability, fault_count_lower, fault_count_upper, feature_importance, model_type, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.deviceId}, #{item.predictionDate}, #{item.targetMonth}, #{item.predictedFaultCount}, #{item.failureProbability}, #{item.faultCountLower}, #{item.faultCountUpper}, #{item.featureImportance}, #{item.modelType}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.device_id, p.prediction_date, p.target_month, p.predicted_fault_count, p.failure_probability, p.fault_count_lower, p.fault_count_upper, p.feature_importance, p.model_type, p.created_at, e.code AS device_code, e.name AS device_name, h.health_score AS current_health_score, h.risk_level AS current_risk_level FROM ai_fault_prediction p LEFT JOIN equipment e ON p.device_id = e.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT device_id, health_score, risk_level FROM ai_device_health WHERE (device_id, record_date) IN ( SELECT device_id, MAX(record_date) FROM ai_device_health GROUP BY device_id ) ) h ON p.device_id = h.device_id WHERE p.device_id = #{deviceId} AND p.target_month = #{targetMonth}

SELECT p.id, p.device_id, p.prediction_date, p.target_month, p.predicted_fault_count, p.failure_probability, p.fault_count_lower, p.fault_count_upper, p.feature_importance, p.model_type, p.created_at, e.code AS device_code, e.name AS device_name, h.health_score AS current_health_score, h.risk_level AS current_risk_level FROM ai_fault_prediction p LEFT JOIN equipment e ON p.device_id = e.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT device_id, health_score, risk_level FROM ai_device_health WHERE (device_id, record_date) IN ( SELECT device_id, MAX(record_date) FROM ai_device_health GROUP BY device_id ) ) h ON p.device_id = h.device_id WHERE p.device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY p.prediction_date DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT p.id, p.device_id, p.prediction_date, p.target_month, p.predicted_fault_count, p.failure_probability, p.fault_count_lower, p.fault_count_upper, p.feature_importance, p.model_type, p.created_at FROM ai_fault_prediction p WHERE p.device_id = #{deviceId} AND p.target_month >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH), '%Y-%m') ORDER BY p.target_month ASC

SELECT p.id, p.device_id, p.prediction_date, p.target_month, p.predicted_fault_count, p.failure_probability, p.fault_count_lower, p.fault_count_upper, p.feature_importance, p.model_type, p.created_at, e.code AS device_code, e.name AS device_name, h.health_score AS current_health_score, h.risk_level AS current_risk_level FROM ai_fault_prediction p LEFT JOIN equipment e ON p.device_id = e.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT device_id, health_score, risk_level FROM ai_device_health WHERE (device_id, record_date) IN ( SELECT device_id, MAX(record_date) FROM ai_device_health GROUP BY device_id ) ) h ON p.device_id = h.device_id WHERE p.failure_probability > #{probabilityThreshold} AND p.prediction_date = ( SELECT MAX(prediction_date) FROM ai_fault_prediction WHERE device_id = p.device_id ) ORDER BY p.failure_probability DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.target_month AS targetMonth, AVG(ABS(p.predicted_fault_count - COALESCE(f.fault_count, 0))) AS avgError, (1 - AVG(ABS(p.predicted_fault_count - COALESCE(f.fault_count, 0)) / GREATEST(1, p.predicted_fault_count + COALESCE(f.fault_count, 0)))) * 100 AS accuracy FROM ai_fault_prediction p LEFT JOIN ai_device_feature f ON p.device_id = f.device_id AND p.target_month = f.stat_month WHERE p.target_month >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH), '%Y-%m') AND p.target_month < DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m') GROUP BY p.target_month ORDER BY p.target_month ASC
